description_long: This object is a long, narrow, and straight-edged knife or sword with a rectangular profile and a dark, weathered appearance. The blade appears to be made of metal, showing signs of wear and oxidation, suggesting it has been used or exposed to the elements. The handle is minimally differentiated from the blade, lacking any visible ergonomic shaping or decorative features, and appears to be constructed from the same material as the blade. There is no visible guard or crossguard separating the handle from the blade, giving the object a utilitarian and simple design. The overall finish is matte and rough, with a dark brown to black coloration dominating the surface. The object is solid and robust, likely intended for heavy-duty or utilitarian use rather than display.
description: A long, straight, rectangular-bladed knife or sword with a dark, weathered, and rough metal surface. The handle is simple and undifferentiated, with no visible guard or ornamentation.
description_view_0: A thin side profile showing the narrowness and straightness of the blade and handle.
description_view_1: A broad view of the flat blade surface, revealing its rectangular shape and weathered, dark coloration.
description_view_2: Another thin side profile, similar to view 0, emphasizing the object's slimness.
description_view_3: The opposite flat side of the blade, showing more of the dark, rough surface and rectangular form.
attribute_handle_design: straight, unadorned, same material as blade, no visible grip texture
